title: Personal settings
subtitle: Manage your profile, security, and interface preferences.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: This information appears in your team space and the admin console.
profile.name: Display name
profile.emailHint: Only an administrator can change the sign-in email.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Choose the default interface language after sign-in.
preferences.languageHint: The change is applied to your account immediately.

security.title: Password & security
security.description: Changing your password signs out all web and browser extension sessions.
security.mismatch: The new passwords do not match
security.changed: Password changed. Please sign in again.

invite.title: Join a team space
invite.description: You have been invited to join {{organization}}.

space.title: Team space settings
space.subtitle: Manage team members, roles, and space settings.
space.notFound: This team space does not exist or has been archived.
space.forbidden: You do not have permission to manage this team space.
space.inviteCreated: Invitation created. Copy the link and send it to the member.
space.basicDescription: The team space name appears in each member's space switcher.
space.name: Team space name
space.archiveDescription: Members will lose access and public shares will be revoked. Platform administrators can restore or permanently delete it from the recycle bin.
space.archiveConfirm: Archive “{{name}}”? Existing public shares will be revoked immediately.
